case_title: THE HOUSING GUILD MANAGEMENT CO. VS. THE GIFT BOX, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RENTAL AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75137593) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE HOUSING GUILD MANAGEMENT CO.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75140238) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE ($116.66/DAY) (TRANSACTION ID # 75187632) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE HOUSING GUILD MANAGEMENT CO.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE HOUSING GUILD MANAGEMENT CO. AS TO DEFENDANT THE GIFT BOX, INC. DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75109449), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE HOUSING GUILD MANAGEMENT CO. SERVED NOV-01-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE NOV-02-2024 AS TO DEFENDANT THE GIFT BOX, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE HOUSING GUILD MANAGEMENT CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE GIFT BOX, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1821 IRVING STREET SAN FRANCISCO CA 94122 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75140238)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT THE GIFT BOX, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT THE GIFT BOX, INC.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 75109449) AS TO DEFENDANT THE GIFT BOX, INC.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (COMMERCIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE HOUSING GUILD MANAGEMENT CO. AS TO DEFENDANT THE GIFT BOX, INC. DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
